name: Fried Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tomatoes into 3/4-inch thick slices.
2. Salt and pepper both sides of the tomato slices.
3. Dredge each slice in flour, coating well and shaking off excess.
4. Heat butter until foamy, but not browned.
5. Cook the tomatoes gently, turning them carefully to avoid breaking.
6. Before flipping, crumble 1 tablespoon of brown sugar over the tops.
7. Flip the tomatoes and add extra butter if needed.
8. Crumble the remaining brown sugar over the tomatoes.
9. Fry until both sides are lightly browned.
10. Remove the tomatoes from the pan.
